result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  console-weather [options]

Options:
  -c, --city <city>          Get city name
  --no-alerts                Hide weather alerts [default: False]
  -f, --forecast             Show weather forecast [default: False]
  -u, --units <Eu|Si|Uk|Us>  Set weather units [default: Eu]
  -a, --air-quality          Show air quality [default: False]
  --dont-show-icons          Disable weather icons [default: False]
  -as, --astronomy           Show astronomy data [default: False]
  -hw, --hourly-weather      Show hourly weather [default: False]
  --version                  Show version information
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information
